# Claude Code Guides

> Comprehensive developer resource with 2,600+ practical tutorials for Claude Code, Claude API, AI agent workflows, prompt engineering, and Chrome extension development. Written by Michael Lip, solo founder of Zovo, with $400K+ Upwork earnings and 100% Job Success Score.

## Key Topics

- Claude Code: Installation, configuration, skills, slash commands, CLAUDE.md templates, debugging workflows
- Claude API: Authentication, tool use, function calling, streaming, batch processing, error handling
- AI Agents: Multi-agent orchestration, memory systems, goal decomposition, handoff strategies
- MCP (Model Context Protocol): Server setup, integration patterns, custom tools
- Prompt Engineering: System prompts, chain-of-thought, few-shot learning, evaluation metrics
- Chrome Extensions: Building, publishing, Manifest V3, content scripts, service workers, reviews
- Developer Workflows: TDD with AI, code review automation, architecture design, database schema

## Docs

- [Getting Started](https://claudecodeguides.com/topics/getting-started/): Beginner tutorials for Claude Code setup and first projects
- [API Guides](https://claudecodeguides.com/topics/api/): Production-ready Claude API integration tutorials
- [Agent Guides](https://claudecodeguides.com/topics/agents/): Multi-agent system design and implementation
- [MCP Guides](https://claudecodeguides.com/topics/mcp/): Model Context Protocol server and tool integration
- [Prompt Engineering](https://claudecodeguides.com/topics/prompt-engineering/): Advanced prompting techniques and workflows
- [Chrome Extensions](https://claudecodeguides.com/topics/chrome-extensions/): Extension development, reviews, and comparisons
- [All Guides](https://claudecodeguides.com/all-articles/): Complete index of 2,600+ tutorials
